business.name: DolFun Tours
business.tagline: Dolphin & Manatee Eco Tours in Melbourne, Florida

hero.headline: See dolphins, manatees, and Florida wildlife up close.
hero.text: Family-friendly eco tours with a local captain, beautiful water views, and an unforgettable day on the lagoon.

tours.title: Public Eco Tour
tours.description: A relaxing wildlife tour searching for dolphins, manatees, birds, and beautiful lagoon views.

tours.title: Private Charter
tours.description: Reserve the boat for your group, birthday, visitors, sunset cruise, or private family adventure.

reviews.name: Happy Guest
reviews.quote: Captain Bob was amazing. We saw dolphins and had a perfect day on the water.

reviews.name: Family Visitor
reviews.quote: Great family experience, easy booking, and the kids loved every minute.

reviews.name: Florida Local
reviews.quote: Affordable, relaxing, and one of the best ways to enjoy the Indian River Lagoon.

faq.question: Will we definitely see dolphins?
faq.answer: Wildlife sightings cannot be guaranteed, but dolphins and manatees are commonly seen in the area.

faq.question: Is this good for kids?
faq.answer: Yes. These tours are family-friendly and designed to be relaxing and fun for all ages.

faq.question: Can we book a private tour?
faq.answer: Yes. Private charters are available and are great for families, birthdays, visitors, and special occasions.
